requirements.jd_requirement: Build and maintain secure cloud-native applications across AWS, GCP, Azure
requirements.evidence: Built and operated containerized security services on AWS ECS with IAM, secrets management, and service hardening; experienced across GCP and Azure in multi-cloud environments

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop internal tooling to automate security workflows, vulnerability remediation, and access control
requirements.evidence: Created Python/PowerShell automation for endpoint patch orchestration, vulnerability remediation, and cross-platform API-driven security workflows (e.g., Microsoft Graph)

requirements.jd_requirement: Integrate security tooling into CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code workflows
requirements.evidence: Embedded security gates into GitHub Actions and GitLab CI pipelines; used Terraform and Ansible for secure infrastructure provisioning

requirements.jd_requirement: Design and implement identity and access management controls across cloud and on-prem systems
requirements.matched_skills: MFA integrations;Access control implementation;Authentication provider integration
requirements.evidence: Designed IAM architectures with cross-team coordination, MFA integrations, and identity portal security patterns

requirements.jd_requirement: Analyze security data to detect anomalies, correlate events, and drive risk-based prioritization
requirements.evidence: Built log correlation and anomaly detection pipelines using Pandas/NumPy to prioritize vulnerabilities and reduce false positives

requirements.jd_requirement: Leverage AI/ML to augment SecOps workflows while ensuring auditability and governance
requirements.evidence: Developed auditable RAG pipelines with LangChain and vector databases to surface security context from internal docs and alerts

requirements.jd_requirement: Collaborate with engineering teams to embed security into application design and delivery
requirements.evidence: Translated security requirements into deployable controls across DevOps teams and documented operational runbooks for long-term maintainability

tone_notes: Granicus serves government and public sector clients—emphasize reliability, compliance awareness, operational rigor, and mission-driven impact. Avoid overly commercial or startup-flavored language; prioritize clarity, stability, and public-sector relevance.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds durable, production-grade tooling and automation to harden cloud-native applications for mission-critical public-sector systems—highlighting operational reliability, IAM/DevSecOps integration, and AI-augmented SecOps with governance.
